name: Skeletal Avenger
short_description: Embark on a bone-chilling quest for vengeance as a skull-hurling skeletal warrior in Skeletal Avenger! This captivating roguelite dungeon crawler melds hack'n'slash mayhem with endlessly replayable gameplay, offering a thrilling, ever-evolving experience that keeps you coming back for more.
detailed_description:
Embark on a bone-chilling quest for vengeance as a fearsome, skull-hurling skeletal warrior in Skeletal Avenger! This captivating roguelite dungeon crawler melds hack'n'slash mayhem with endlessly replayable gameplay, offering a thrilling, ever-evolving experience that keeps you coming back for more.

In Skeletal Avenger, no two runs are alike. Each descent into the treacherous depths brings new opportunities to tailor your playstyle with powerful perks and upgrades. Embrace the chaos and forge a relentless path of destruction through an ever-changing underworld filled with bizarre, formidable foes.

The ultimate goal: vengeance. But to achieve it, you must first harness an arsenal of deadly weapons, master the art of bone-crushing combat, and outwit the unpredictable denizens of the dungeon's depths.

Dare to defy the odds and dive headfirst into the dark, immersive world of Skeletal Avenger. With every strike, swing, and skull-toss, you'll inch closer to reclaiming your honor and exacting retribution on those who wronged you. The time for revenge is now – will you seize it?

Features
  • Build your playstyle each run with over 50 perks and trinkets!
  • Decapitate yourself to do special attacks: Your hat determines the effect
  • Fight in four biomes: Dungeons, Sewers, Dark Caverns and the Sorcerer's Castle
  • Over a dozen enemies with unique behaviors
  • Explore procedurally generated & hand made levels
  • Equip your skeleton with increasingly powerful gear
  • Buy upgrades increasing your might
  • Single player and 2-4 player local co-op
  • Endless number of quests to complete in NG+ mode
  • Test your skills in the Arena Challenges



With over 50 perks and trinkets, you'll get to build a new playstyle with each run.




Chuck your skull and unleash devastating special attacks! Explore the dungeons to find loot and become an undead machine of revenge!



Fast-paced ultra-responsive hack'n'slash gameplay with unique movesets for each weapon!



Choose a skeleton to be your tool of vengeance. Each skeleton has a unique set of skills and a perk to choose from. Steer your avenger through unique procedurally generated challenges with endless variety and finally avenge your own murder.



Ransack the homesteads of your adversaries to gain more powerful gear, coin and other loot to increase your power.

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Finnish, Japanese, Korean, Russian, Simplified Chinese
*languages with full audio support
